style_template: privacy_picket / horizontal_board / split_rail / panel / vinyl_horizontal / mesh
infill_desc: What the infill material is called
infill_units_per_section: For privacy_picket: leave blank (app calculates from width). For horizontal_board/split_rail: enter number of boards or rails per section (eg 3). For panel: enter 1.
infill_cost_ea: Cost per picket / board / panel / rail ($)
rail_desc: What the rail is called — leave blank if boards ARE the rails (horizontal_board)
rails_per_section: Number of rails per section — leave blank if boards ARE the rails
post_cost_6ft_post: Cost of post for a 4ft fence (6ft post) ($)
post_cost_8ft_post: Cost of post for a 6ft or 8ft fence (8ft post) ($)
gate_post_cost_10ft: Cost of 6x6x10 gate post — used when Top Cap add-on selected ($)
labor_per_lf: Installed labor cost per linear foot ($)

notes: 13 boards fills a 6ft section tight (6ft ÷ 5.5in actual). Cap is 1 board per section on top.
